description: A tag list whose serialized Avro frame is 4097 bytes (one over MAX_TAG_BYTES). The reference implementation rejects it, so no signed .bin is emitted. serialize_error is thrown by serializeTags() when the frame overflows its fixed MAX_TAG_BYTES buffer; verify_rejects_oversize_tag_bytes records that DataItem.verify() returns false for a binary whose declared tag byte count exceeds MAX_TAG_BYTES.
